name: Jiangxi Hongdu Aviation Industry Co., Ltd.
summary: Jiangxi Hongdu Aviation Industry Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, production, maintenance, sale, and service guarantee of trainer aircraft products in China and internationally. It also offers general aircraft, and other aviation products and parts. Jiangxi Hongdu Aviation Industry Co., Ltd. was founded in 1999 and is based in Nanchang, China.
